body.purpose: Default reading text, table cells, descriptions.

label.purpose: Button text, form labels, nav items.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Default card state — barely perceptible separation.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Desktop start — sidebar visible, table mode.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Wide desktop — expanded sidebars, larger padding.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action — used for submit, approve, create, save.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: #2E7D32; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25rem; border: none; border-radius: 7px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4CAF50; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; box-shadow: none; } .ds-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: #FFFFFF; color: #111827; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB; border-radius: 7px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #F1F5F1; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.2); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field with label, optional icon, and error state.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.375rem; } .ds-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-required { color: #DC2626; margin-left: 2px; } .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; } .ds-input-icon { position: absolute; left: 0.75rem; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); display: flex; align-items: center; pointer-events: none; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem 0.5rem 2.25rem; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB; border-radius: 7px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #111827; background: #FFFFFF; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.5); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: #9CA3AF; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2E7D32; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.2); } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color: #DC2626; } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"]:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.2); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Semantic status indicator with optional leading dot.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; background: #DCFCE7; color: #16A34A; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.025em; border-radius: 9999px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #16A34A; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Content grouping container — used on dashboards and mobile list views.
components.html:
Cabang
Jakarta Pusat
Status
Aktif
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid rgba(229, 231, 235, 0.6); border-radius: 7px; padding: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.04), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.04); } .ds-card-body { margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .ds-card-body:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } .ds-card-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #9CA3AF; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 0.125rem; } .ds-card-value { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; background: #DCFCE7; color: #16A34A; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.025em; border-radius: 9999px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #16A34A; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Table Header Row
components.description: Data table header with sortable columns.
components.html: Nama Prospek Status Cabang
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; text-align: left; } .ds-th-row { background: #E8EDE8; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(229, 231, 235, 0.6); } .ds-th { padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #6B7280; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-sort-icon { display: inline-flex; vertical-align: middle; margin-left: 0.25rem; color: #9CA3AF; }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item with active state.
components.html: Prospek Proyek Persetujuan
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.125rem; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #374151; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 7px; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #F1F5F1; } .ds-nav-active { background: #E8F5E9; color: #2E7D32; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-active:hover { background: #E8F5E9; } .ds-nav-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; color: #6B7280; } .ds-nav-active .ds-nav-icon { color: #2E7D32; }

components.name: Select Dropdown
components.description: Native select element with consistent form styling.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.375rem; } .ds-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-select-wrap { position: relative; } .ds-select { width: 100%; padding: 0.5rem 2rem 0.5rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB; border-radius: 7px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #111827; background: #FFFFFF; outline: none; cursor: pointer; appearance: none; -webkit-appearance: none; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-select:hover { border-color: #9CA3AF; } .ds-select:focus { border-color: #2E7D32; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.2); } .ds-select-arrow { position: absolute; right: 0.75rem; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); pointer-events: none; display: flex; align-items: center; }

narrative.overview:
Kinetic CRM's visual identity is rooted in the confidence of a filing system where every decision is recorded, every approval is stamped, and every document is in its place. The interface communicates authority through precision, not decoration — clean structure, deliberate spacing, and a restrained green accent that signals completion and approval without dominating the surface.

This system explicitly rejects two extremes: the visual heaviness of legacy enterprise CRMs and the casual playfulness of consumer apps. Kinetic occupies the middle: professional, purposeful, and unadorned. The tool should disappear into the task.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal depth via surface containers, not shadows
Single sans-serif family (Inter) at all levels
Green as an accent for primary actions and state indicators, never decoration
Consistent 2px focus rings and 200ms transitions throughout
Responsive by structure, not by fluid typography

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The official-green accent is used on no more than ~10% of any given surface. Its rarity is what makes it meaningful — primary buttons, active nav items, selected rows. Applying green to passive elements dilutes its authority signal.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: Surface hierarchy is expressed through lightness, not shadow. The surface container scale steps from lightest to darkest within the green-tinted neutral family. Deeper = closer to the user.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: Kinetic CRM uses one type family (Inter) for everything — display, headings, body, labels. There is no display/body pairing. Hierarchy comes from weight, size, and spacing, not a font change.

rules.name: The 14px Rule
rules.body: 1rem = 14px, not 16px. This is not negotiable per-screen; it is the system constant chosen to fit enterprise data-density comfortably.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to interaction — hover, focus, elevation state. A table with 50 rows should not cast 50 shadows.

dos: Use Official Green for primary actions, active nav items, selected rows, and focus indicators — and nothing else.
Express surface hierarchy through the tonal container scale, not through shadows or background colors outside the palette.
Keep buttons, inputs, selects, and badges on the same corner radius vocabulary (rounded-lg at 0.5rem).
Use the 11px uppercase label pattern for all form fields — above the field, never as placeholder text inside it.
Use skeleton loading for tables and card grids. Never show a spinner in the middle of content that has structure.
Provide empty states that teach the interface: what belongs here, how to add it.
Design for both light and dark mode. Every surface token has a dark counterpart; test both.
Use reduced-motion alternatives (instant transitions, no animation) via prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't apply the Official Green accent decoratively — not as card borders, not as background tints on passive elements, not as gradient text.
Don't use shadows as the primary depth mechanism. Tonal layering carries structure; shadows are only for interaction feedback.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't create glassmorphism effects as a default pattern.
Don't use different button shapes or form control styles across different screens.
Don't use display fonts or serif typefaces for UI labels, buttons, or data.
Don't ship a modal when an inline panel, expandable section, or progressive disclosure would work.
Don't add decorative motion or orchestrated page-load sequences.
